page.title: Sky & Timing
page.subtitle: Transits, the sixteen divisional charts and planetary strength — computed on this device from your chart.

periods.title: Vimśottarī Periods
periods.subtitle: The full 120-year daśā tree from your chart. Open a mahā-daśā to read its antar-daśās; the running antar opens onto its pratyantar-daśās.
periods.pd_note: Pratyantar detail is computed for the running antar-daśā.
periods.no_depth: This stored chart predates sub-period detail. Regenerate the chart to explore its antar- and pratyantar-daśās.
periods.unavailable: No daśā sequence is stored for this chart. Regenerate the chart to explore its periods.

gate.title: Compute your timing layer
gate.body: Transits, Sade Sati, all sixteen divisional charts, Ashtakavarga, Shadbala and a twelve-month timeline are computed from the ephemeris on your device. Nothing leaves this browser.
gate.computing_body: Scanning ephemeris positions across the next twelve months on your device. This usually takes about half a minute — {{elapsed}} elapsed.
gate.error_title: The timing layer could not be computed
gate.engine_warming: The chart engine is still starting up. Computation begins once it is ready.
gate.no_chart: Generate your birth chart first — the timing layer is computed from it.

sade_sati.heading: Sade Sati
sade_sati.none_body: Saturn is not currently inside the three-sign Sade Sati corridor around your natal Moon.

slow_hits.heading: Slow-planet Hits & Returns
slow_hits.empty: No exact slow-planet hits inside this window.

fusion.heading: Daśā × Transit Fusion
fusion.subtitle: How the running daśā lords are placed in today's sky.
fusion.house_from_moon: Mahā lord transits house {{house}} from the Moon

timeline.heading: Next Twelve Months
timeline.subtitle: {{start}} – {{end}}
timeline.empty: No timeline events fall inside this window.

vargas.heading: Shodaśavarga — Sixteen Divisional Charts
vargas.chart_unavailable: This divisional chart was not emitted by the engine.
vargas.vargottama_subtitle: Points repeating their Rāśi sign in the Navāṁśa — a classical mark of strength.
vargas.vargottama_empty: No vargottama placements in this chart.
vargas.vimshopaka_subtitle: Twenty-point composite across the sixteen vargas.
vargas.approx_note: Values marked ≈ use a documented approximation of the classical rule — the engine flags them rather than overstating precision.

strength.heading: Planetary Strength
strength.sav_subtitle: Benefic bindus each sign receives from all contributors — {{total}} across the zodiac.
strength.bav_subtitle: Per-graha bindu totals across the twelve signs.
strength.shadbala_subtitle: Six-fold strength in rūpas against the classical minimum for each graha.
strength.approx_footnote: Components marked ≈ use documented approximations of the classical computation; the engine flags every one instead of presenting it as exact.
strength.sunrise_basis: Kālabala is anchored to the civil sunrise preceding birth ({{date}}).

domains.heading: Life Domains
domains.subtitle: A deterministic per-domain synthesis from houses, kārakas, vargas, strength and timing — engine output, not AI.
domains.no_active_dasha: Not emphasized by the running daśā
domains.windows_empty: No dated windows inside the next twelve months.
